title: cyperus luteus var. luteus
intro: Cyperus luteus var. luteus, also known as the yellow papyrus or yellow flat sedge, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Cyperaceae. Traditionally, the plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects, making it a valuable resource in herbal medicine. The health benefits of Cyperus luteus var. luteus include its ability to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its potential to help with kidney and liver function. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
